name: Deploy Next.js (Node v22)

on:
  push:
    branches: [main]

jobs:
  deploy:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
      - name: Deploy via SSH
        uses: appleboy/ssh-action@v1.0.0
        with:
          host: ${{ secrets.HOST }}
          username: ${{ secrets.USER }}
          password: ${{ secrets.PASS }}
          script: |
            # Go to your Next.js project folder
            cd ~/public_html/test || exit 1

            # Pull latest code
            git pull origin main

            # Use Node v22
            export PATH=/usr/local/apps/nodejs22/bin:$PATH

            # Debug
            node -v
            npm -v

            # Install dependencies
            npm install

            # Build Next.js
            # npm run build

            # Restart app (cPanel Node)
            touch tmp/restart.txt
